sme_leads.notes: Fresha-only booking presence with no standalone website, making them invisible to Google search and easy to win over with a simple mobile-first site.
Active business (200+ Birdeye reviews) trading solely through Fresha and Facebook with zero Google-indexed website, a strong quick-win web dev opportunity.
Established salon on Shirley High Street relying only on Instagram, Facebook and Fresha — no website means no SEO and no direct online bookings outside third-party platforms.
20+ years in business with a 4.7-star Google rating but operating entirely through Facebook, making a professional site a natural credibility upgrade.
High-footfall city-centre nail salon listed on Yell and VisitSouthampton but with no owned website, losing direct booking traffic to Facebook and third-party directories.

linkedin_prospects.name: Holly Saywood
linkedin_prospects.title: Sales Director / Associate Director
linkedin_prospects.reason: Leads a team of 10+ sales consultants at a UK construction recruitment agency (51-200 employees), exactly the high-volume B2B outreach environment where CloseCoach would sharpen closing and objection-handling skills.

linkedin_prospects.name: Paul Stead
linkedin_prospects.title: Sales Manager
linkedin_prospects.reason: Manages a 7-rep automotive sales team at a North East UK car dealership where monthly targets and face-to-face negotiation make AI-driven sales roleplay training a direct performance lever.

linkedin_prospects.name: Greg Tighe
linkedin_prospects.title: Director (Operations & Sales)
linkedin_prospects.reason: Oversees a dedicated sales department at a UK SME insurance broker, a relationship-driven sector where CloseCoach's consultative-selling modules would directly improve broker conversion rates.

dts.title: DVSA wait times are 6+ months — here's how to get your test date in weeks
dts.description: Screen-record the DTS swap flow from sign-up to confirmed earlier date, narrated over punchy text overlays. Hook learners already frustrated by long waiting lists.

dts.title: POV: you passed your driving test 3 months early
dts.description: Testimonial-style clip or Twitter/X thread where a real DTS user shares their story of grabbing a cancellation slot — humanises the product and drives word-of-mouth sign-ups.

athletics.title: Calisthenics to Sprint Power — does gym strength carry to the track?
athletics.description: Film a muscle-up or weighted L-sit session one day, then film a 60m acceleration block the next. Voiceover explaining the hip-flexor and core carry-over — niche but highly shareable among calisthenics and sprint communities.

athletics.title: My pre-sprint activation routine (film at the track)
athletics.description: Compact warm-up sequence — hip flexor openers, ankle circles, A-skips, wall drives — with on-screen labels. Low effort to film, evergreen content, strong save-rate from athletes who want to steal the routine.

aimybiz.title: I gave my AI sales coach a cold call script. Here's what it said.
aimybiz.description: Share a screenshot of CloseCoach feedback on a real (or demo) cold call script — highlight one specific insight about pacing, question ratio, or objection handling. Ends with a CTA to try it. Speaks directly to sales managers reviewing team call quality.

aimybiz.title: Watch CloseCoach roleplay a discovery call live
aimybiz.description: Screen-record CloseCoach playing the prospect in a discovery call roleplay, with Dowayne as the sales rep. Pause to show the AI feedback panel. Ideal hook for sales managers who want to see AI training in action before committing.
